description:
🕒 10:00–12:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-naguricanoe-sup/

SUP (stand-up paddleboarding) at Lake Naguri is a gentle eco-tour that lets you experience the changing seasons and the lake's peaceful waters with your whole body. Paddle smoothly across the water while learning about the Naguri ecosystem and natural beauty in an environmentally conscious way.

【Fee】¥4,000 per person (includes guide, insurance, SUP board rental, etc.)

【Capacity】5 people

【Guide】Staff from the certified NPO Naguri Canoe Workshop

【What to bring】Water-resistant clothing that you can move in even when wet: rash guard, swimsuit, board shorts, swim trunks, capris, leggings, etc. *Life jackets are provided.

【More info】Certified NPO Naguri Canoe Workshop website: https://naguri-canoe.co.jp/
location: 集合 名栗カヌー工房（国際興業バス「ノーラ名栗・さわらびの湯」下車徒歩20分、または「河又名栗湖入口」下車25分）
summary: Beginner-friendly! Hands-free SUP experience at Lake Naguri – a moment of calm and healing
